style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;startSize=20;" value="Nav2 堆栈" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="410" x="240" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.25;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.25;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="node_amcl" value="/scan"> <mxGeometry relative="1" relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="link_odom" edge="1" parent="1" source="node_actuator" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" value="发布 /odom"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.2" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="875" y="720" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="link_map" edge="1" parent="1" source="node_map"
